package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContains() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_string_handling_byte_string_roundtrip_for_contains"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: String handling. Flag string/[]byte roundtrips around Contains/Index checks that have native package variants."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
